song.title: No Price Too High to Pay
song.lyrics: [V1] If in all I do, There's a profit for you There's no price too high to pay. If in all I do there's a profit for you, I will suffer any loss.|| Though I know the future will be hard, Tearful eyes will always greet the Lord. If in all I do, There's a profit for you I am willing to give all.
